description_long: This object is a short sword with a straight, double-edged blade that appears to be made of dark metal. The blade is broad and tapers to a blunt point, giving it a robust and utilitarian appearance. The hilt features a simple, angular crossguard in a metallic gold color, providing hand protection and visual contrast to the blade. The handle is cylindrical, also gold-toned, and ends in a rounded pommel, suggesting a comfortable grip for one-handed use. There are no visible engravings or decorative elements on the blade, guard, or handle, emphasizing a functional design. The overall construction suggests durability and practicality, suitable for display or use in urban-themed scenarios.
description: A short, straight-bladed sword with a dark metal blade and gold-toned hilt, featuring a simple crossguard and rounded pommel. The design is functional and unadorned.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight, dark blade and the gold crossguard and handle.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the broad, flat blade and the angular crossguard extending outward.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first, with the blade and hilt profile visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the handle and pommel, with the blade's width and crossguard visible.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, gold-toned, rounded pommel, smooth surface
